welcome.ctaSubtext: You're early — the studio takes ~3 minutes to set up
welcome.nativeTitle: A private room for plotting your next chapter
welcome.nativeDescription: Boards, affirmations, structures, and tracking — one quiet workspace for the life you're building in secret first.

desire.title: Pick your plot

welcome.communityProof: People who plot in private, then show up different in public

whispers.0: Most people scroll past this. You didn't.
whispers.1: The girls who plot in private win in public.
whispers.2: Rebrands happen quietly, then all at once.
whispers.3: You're in the studio now. Lock in.
whispers.5: Weird-girl money is just a plan with taste.
whispers.6: Nobody has to know you're rebranding yet.

light.title: Light

consistent.title: Consistent
consistent.tagline: For girls who show up daily.

lockedIn.description: High-touch rhythm with up to 3 daily reminders, if selected.
